floor 0.4, else 400 LIVENESS_FAILED

span.p:
cosine distance below 0.4 (prod),
0.55 if enrollment older than 2 y

div.style: color: rgb(31, 41, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

pgvector, Fernet store-
of-record, HNSW index

JWT (RS256) + rotating refresh token
